name: Almond Nog
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Ground nutmeg, - more if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the almond milk, bananas, nutmeg, and vanilla extract in a blender.
2. Blend until smooth.
3. Sprinkle a little nutmeg on top of the mixture.
4. Serve immediately as the banana's flavor changes when it sits after blending. Do not attempt to keep the mixture in the refrigerator.
